flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Montana State University Billings rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.0k → $7.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Montana State University Billings rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.4k → $22.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Montana State University Billings fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Montana State University Billings rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (13.6% → 16.5%).
